settings.title: Settings
settings.piiDesc: Detect personal info in your messages
settings.piiTypesDesc: Choose which types of personal data to detect
settings.autoPseudonymizeDesc: Replace personal data with fake values before sending
settings.proxyModeInfo:
Auto: Personal data is automatically replaced with fake values before sending.

Confirm: A dialog shows what was detected, letting you review before sending.
settings.showNotificationDesc: Banner when personal data is protected
settings.blockThresholdDesc: Score at which input is blocked
settings.blockThresholdInfo:
Each detected item adds 15 points (e.g. 4 items = 60 pts).
When the score reaches this threshold, the message is blocked before sending and a confirmation dialog is shown.

Lower = stricter (blocks sooner),
Higher = more lenient.
settings.inputLanguageDesc: Language for detecting personal data patterns
settings.allowedSitesDesc: One domain per line — these sites skip scanning.
settings.devModeDesc: Show Dev Logs tab in floating badge panel
settings.devModeHint: Open the floating badge to view logs

aegis.title: AEGIS Server
aegis.desc: Advanced AI protection against prompt attacks
aegis.invalid: Connection failed — check URL and key
aegis.invalidDetail: Could not authenticate with the AEGIS server. Check that the URL is correct and the API key is valid (format: aegis_sk_...).
aegis.endpointJudgeInfo:
Runs the full 6-layer PALADIN defense pipeline in a single request:

1. Trust Boundary — validates request origin
2. Intent Verification — NLI-based jailbreak detection
3. RAG Guard — embedding-based semantic analysis
4. Class-RAG — harmful/sensitive content classification
5. Circuit Breaker — anomaly detection
6. Rational Analysis — final reasoning

After all layers, a Rule Engine applies tenant-specific policies and returns a final decision: Approve, Block, Modify, Escalate, Reask, or Throttle.

This is the most comprehensive endpoint — recommended for most use cases.
aegis.endpointJailbreakInfo:
Specialized 3-stage jailbreak detection:

1. Keyword/Pattern Scan — multi-language detection of known attack patterns (DAN, instruction override, developer mode, few-shot, CoT exploitation, tool injection, prompt extraction, etc.)
2. Intent Verification — NLI model analyzes whether the text attempts to manipulate the AI
3. LLM Semantic Analysis — for borderline cases, an LLM performs deep semantic threat assessment

Focused on detecting role-play exploitation, filter bypass, encoding tricks, and instruction overrides.
aegis.endpointSafetyInfo:
Content safety analysis across multiple harm categories:

1. Keyword Detection — flags violence, drugs, hacking, self-harm, weapons, etc.
2. NLI Classification — ONNX-based safety scoring (falls back to heuristic NLI)
3. Circuit Breaker — cross-validates with anomaly detection
4. LLM Fallback — for low-confidence results, an LLM performs final classification

Returns per-category scores for: dangerous, harassment, hate speech, sexual, and toxic content. Differs from jailbreak detection by focusing on the content itself rather than attack intent.
aegis.endpointClassifyDesc: Categorizes the type of risk detected
aegis.endpointClassifyInfo:
Broad threat classification using semantic similarity + heuristics:

1. Prompt Injection Detection — checks for Base64 encoding, system prompt extraction, instruction override, privilege escalation, tool hijacking, and DAN patterns
2. Class-RAG — semantic similarity-based risk categorization
3. LLM Review — for borderline confidence (0.3–0.7), an LLM re-classifies with language-specific prompts

Classifies into: safe, harmful, sensitive, jailbreak, or prompt injection. Broader than jailbreak detection, which only checks for manipulation attempts.
aegis.endpointKoreanInfo:
12-stage analyzer designed for Korean-specific obfuscation and evasion techniques:

• Keyboard mapping (English→Korean)
• Old Korean characters (옛한글)
• Homoglyph substitution
• Hanja (漢字) bypass
• Zero-width character injection
• Jamo (자소) separation
• Slang and coded language
• Particle insertion obfuscation
• Syllable reversal
• Phonetic variation
• Initial consonant encoding (초성)
• Korean-English code-switching

Normalizes Korean text and detects bypass patterns that other endpoints may miss.
aegis.planDeniedBanner: Your plan does not include {{version}} API access. Endpoints marked with a lock require a plan upgrade.
aegis.info: AEGIS server provides advanced AI protection against prompt attacks such as jailbreak and injection. Server results take priority over local detection.

proxy.confirmDesc: The following personal data was detected and will be masked:

popover.title: Privacy Protection
popover.description: AI-detected personal data is highlighted in yellow
popover.descriptionFull: AI automatically detects personal data in your input and highlights it in yellow. When sent, this data is replaced with fake values for protection. Hover over highlighted items to cancel false detections, or drag to select text for manual masking.
popover.inlineDesc: Highlighted data will be replaced with fake values when sent.
popover.dragHint: Drag to select text for masking

floating.title: Aegis Personal
floating.connectPrompt: Connect AEGIS server for advanced protection
floating.logEmptyHint: Logs appear when scans are performed.
